title: Round head shape (Shih Tzu)
caption: Round head shape: scissor evenly off the nose so the outline stays circular.
teaching_point: Scissor evenly in every direction off the nose as the center point, so the outline stays perfectly round with no flat spots or corners.

title: Rectangle head shape (terrier)
caption: Rectangle head shape: keep cheeks tight and flat, extend the beard forward.
teaching_point: Long lean profile, muzzle about as long as the back-skull. Leave beard and eyebrows longer and comb forward to extend the muzzle; keep cheeks tight and flat so the rectangle reads clean.
